  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Abondance
    Represents an Abondance bid (9, 10, 11, or 12 cards)
    Bid
    Abstract class representing the current Round's bid (not a player's bid)
    BidType
    Enum for the different types of bids during the bidding phase of the game.
    BotDifficulty
    An enumeration of the available bot difficulty levels in the game.
    BotPlayer
    Represents a bot player in the game of Whist.
    Card
    Represents a card in the game of Whist.
    CLI
    Base class for Command Line Interfaces used in the Whist application.
    Controller
    The controller; acts as a thin communication layer between the UI layer and DOMAIN layer
    Deck
    Represents a deck of cards in the game of Whist.
    Game
     
    GameCLI
    Base CLI for game modes that run a Whist game loop.
    Hand
    Represents a hand of cards in the game of Whist.
    HighBot
    Represents a bot player that plays high cards.
    LowBot
    Represents a bot player that plays low cards.
    Main
     
    MainMenuCLI
     
    Miserie
    Represents a Miserie bid (0 cards)
    OpenMiserie
    Represents an Open Miserie bid (0 cards, but with the possibility of showing cards)
    Player
    Represents a player in the game of Whist.
    PlayGame
     
    PlayGameCLI
    CLI for playing a virtual game of Whist.
    PlayRound
     
    Proposal
    Represents a Proposal bid (8 tricks with a specified suit)
    ProposalAlone
    Represents a proposal to play alone in the game of Whist.
    ProposalWithPartner
    Represents a proposal to play with a partner in the game of Whist.
    Round
     
    ScoreGame
     
    ScoreGameCLI
    CLI for tracking the score of a physical Whist game.
    ScoreRound
     
    Solo
     
    SoloSlim
     
    Suit
    Represents the suit of a card in the game of Whist.
    Trick
     
    Value
